action: Collect transcripts grading scale syllabus and medium-of-instruction evidence; map statistics linear algebra programming and business credits
deliverable: Academic evidence folder and prerequisite matrix
success_measure: 100% of current modules mapped to likely analytics/tech-management prerequisites
track_a_link: Turns existing skills into verifiable academic fit
risk_control: Do not assume a 3-year Indian degree or MOI letter is accepted; verify per school

action: Strengthen probability statistics linear algebra SQL and data visualization using assessed coursework or reputable certificates
deliverable: One reproducible analytics project with code data dictionary and report
success_measure: Can explain model assumptions validation limits and business decision impact
track_a_link: Adds analytics depth to software portfolio
risk_control: Prefer graded/assessed evidence over certificate collecting

action: Choose one ERP/dashboard/automation tool and obtain responsible real-user feedback
deliverable: Case study with baseline intervention outcome and testimonial where permitted
success_measure: At least one defensible metric such as time saved error reduction users or revenue

risk_control: Do not fabricate users revenue or impact; anonymize private data

action: Build sustained academic relationship with quantitative faculty and one project/work supervisor
deliverable: Two future recommender relationships with evidence packets
success_measure: Each recommender has observed work over multiple months
track_a_link: Track A supervisor can validate execution and teamwork
risk_control: Never ghostwrite confidential recommendation content; provide factual evidence only

action: Secure substantive internship startup engagement research assistantship or paid client project
deliverable: Role with defined scope manager and outcome
success_measure: 12+ weeks or equivalent sustained delivery with reviewable result
risk_control: Depth and supervision matter more than brand name

action: Lead a small team workshop campus initiative or community tech project
deliverable: Leadership artifact with goals roles decisions conflict and outcomes
success_measure: One completed initiative and independent validator
track_a_link: Demonstrates management potential beyond solo coding

action: Reduce research universe to 3-4 countries and decide GRE vs GMAT
deliverable: Decision memo and no more than one active admissions test
success_measure: At least 80% of likely programs accept chosen test or are test-optional

action: Take chosen admissions test if it adds value
success_measure: Meet target band or document rational no-score strategy
risk_control: Retake only after section-level improvement evidence

action: Hold family financial review and research loans/scholarships
deliverable: Written maximum self-funding loan ceiling and emergency reserve
success_measure: Every prospective country assigned affordable conditional or unaffordable
track_a_link: Track A earnings can cover exams/application costs
risk_control: Use conservative India-return salary; do not count part-time work

action: Audit 10-12 programs line by line for degree equivalence prerequisites tests funding and graduation timing
deliverable: Final application matrix across four risk bands
success_measure: At least 2 financially safe eligible backups and no prerequisite guesses
track_a_link: Best Track A outcomes drive program/essay fit
risk_control: Remove any school that will not confirm documented eligibility from published rules

action: Take IELTS Academic; draft CV evidence inventory and recommender packets
deliverable: Valid English score and factual application source pack
success_measure: Target score met with one retake window remaining
track_a_link: Portfolio metrics supply essays and CV bullets
risk_control: Do not use generic or AI-fabricated personal stories

action: Apply in verified rounds with scholarship timing; keep India job path active
deliverable: 8-12 complete applications only after final eligibility/funding gate
success_measure: Balanced submissions and zero missed scholarship dependencies
track_a_link: Track A continues income experience and fallback
risk_control: No deposit until total cost refund visa and funding recheck

action: If funding or readiness is weak work 12-24 months in software product analytics or startup operations and reapply
deliverable: Stronger outcomes leadership savings and recommendations
success_measure: Material improvement in at least three weak dimensions
track_a_link: Track A becomes full-time career capital
risk_control: Treat delay as risk reduction and MBA-option building
